codes.title: Noob Incremental Codes
codes.intro: Redeem active Noob Incremental codes for Tickets, Tokens, Potions, and launch milestone rewards before your first major wall slows the run down.
codes.panelText: Current rewards lean toward release support, bug-fix Tickets, and CCU celebration bundles. Redeem them early so your first upgrade route starts with extra Tokens, Tickets, and Potions.
codes.expiredNote: No expired Noob Incremental codes are listed in the current update snapshot.
codes.tipText: Paste each code one at a time in the ABX code section, then spend the rewards before a long upgrade or rune session.

redeem.title: Noob Incremental How to Redeem Codes
redeem.intro: Use the Shop menu and the ABX code box to claim Noob Incremental rewards. The path is short, but the code field sits lower in the Shop panel than many players expect.

steps.title: Launch Noob Incremental
steps.text: Open Noob Incremental on Roblox and wait for the full game interface to finish loading.

steps.title: Open the Shop
steps.text: Use the Shop button at the bottom of the screen to open the reward and boost menu.

steps.title: Scroll to the ABX Section
steps.text: Keep scrolling until the ABX code entry area appears inside the Shop panel.

steps.title: Enter One Code
steps.text: Paste or type one active Noob Incremental code into the field exactly as written.

steps.title: Press Redeem
steps.text: Claim the attached Tickets, Tokens, Potions, or milestone rewards, then repeat for the next active code.

beginner.title: Noob Incremental Beginner Guide
beginner.intro: The first Noob Incremental session should teach the core loop quickly: buy Noobs, raise Oof, spend on upgrades, roll runes once the loop is stable, and prestige only after progress starts flattening out.

cards.title: Buy Noobs First
cards.text: Every early run begins by expanding your Noob count so Oof generation starts climbing immediately.
cards.playerGoal: Build a steady Oof floor before chasing the deeper systems.

cards.title: Turn Oof Into Momentum
cards.text: Oof is the engine of the opening phase, so every slow patch should be solved by improving how fast Oof returns.
cards.playerGoal: Keep Oof flowing so upgrade purchases stay frequent.

cards.title: Buy Upgrades in Bursts
cards.text: Use short farming windows followed by quick upgrade bursts instead of sitting too long on unspent income.
cards.playerGoal: Stack several multiplier gains before the next wall arrives.

cards.title: Touch Runes After Stabilizing
cards.text: Rune rolling matters more once the Noob and Oof loop is already comfortable enough to support repeat attempts.
cards.playerGoal: Use runes to extend runs, not to rescue a weak opening.

cards.title: Prestige When Gains Slow Down
cards.text: Prestige is the answer when another round of Noob buying or upgrades no longer changes the pace in a meaningful way.
cards.playerGoal: Reset for stronger rebuilds instead of forcing tiny gains.

cards.title: Claim Bonus Sources Early
cards.text: Roblox Plus, the Roblox group, likes, and the community server all feed bonus value into longer sessions.
cards.playerGoal: Lock in every passive boost before a long farming push.

oof.title: Noob Incremental Oof Farming Guide
oof.intro: Oof drives the opening economy in Noob Incremental. The cleanest farming route is to expand Noobs first, buy upgrades in waves, and fold code rewards or rune boosts into the run only after basic income is already moving well.

priorities.title: Buy Noobs Before Anything Else
priorities.reason: The account scales faster when the base Noob count rises before you chase side systems.

priorities.title: Spend Oof on Multiplier Upgrades
priorities.reason: Once Oof is arriving steadily, multipliers push the next wave of upgrades much harder than idle hoarding.

priorities.title: Drop Code Rewards Into the Grind
priorities.reason: Active codes smooth out the early wall and keep the growth curve from flattening too early.

priorities.title: Layer Runes Onto Stable Income
priorities.reason: Runes pay off best once they are amplifying a strong Oof baseline instead of covering for a weak one.

upgrades.title: Noob Incremental Upgrades and Stats Guide
upgrades.intro: Use upgrades, stats, Noobs, Oof gain, Prism gain, rune bonuses, and prestige unlocks to scale faster through Noob Incremental.

rows.playerAction: Buy Noobs as the core starting action.
rows.effect: Noobs help generate Oof, the main early progression output shown in the official play loop.
rows.checkpoint: Start every run by improving Noob-based production before chasing later systems.

rows.playerAction: Generate Oof through Noobs and strengthen it with upgrades.
rows.effect: Oof is the main production target in the official gameplay loop, and Roblox Plus players receive +10% Oof.
rows.checkpoint: Prioritize Oof growth when upgrades are still affordable and gains are moving quickly.

rows.playerAction: Buy upgrades after building enough Oof production.
rows.effect: Upgrades make the player stronger and support faster scaling across the run.
rows.checkpoint: Keep upgrading while costs feel reachable; when progress slows, check runes and prestige options.

rows.playerAction: Track the game's many stat categories as they unlock through progression.
rows.effect: Stats support long-term scaling across upgrades, runes, prestige layers, and other features.
rows.checkpoint: Use stat growth as a signal for whether the current route is still efficient.

rows.playerAction: Use Prism-related gain where available through the game's progression systems.
rows.effect: Roblox Plus players receive +10% Prism according to the official Roblox page.
rows.checkpoint: Treat Prism as a bonus-supported progression resource when comparing account boosts.

rows.playerAction: Roll runes and level them up during progression.
rows.effect: Runes are part of the official power loop and help deepen scaling beyond basic upgrades.
rows.checkpoint: Add rune rolling after basic Oof and upgrade growth are already moving.

rows.playerAction: Join the Ghoulax Games group and like the game.
rows.effect: The official Roblox page lists +10% Rune Speed for players who join the group and like the game.
rows.checkpoint: Claim this before long rune sessions so the speed bonus works during repeated rolling.

rows.effect: The official Roblox page lists +10% Rune Luck for joining the community server.
rows.checkpoint: Use this before rolling runes heavily, especially when hunting stronger rune outcomes.

rows.playerAction: Prestige after building enough power from Noobs, upgrades, stats, and runes.
rows.effect: Prestige unlocks new content and adds deeper progression layers.
rows.checkpoint: Prestige when the in-game option is available and the next unlock is more valuable than staying in the current run.

stats: Start with Noobs and Oof, then widen into runes and prestige when the early route slows.
Use group, like, Roblox Plus, and Discord bonuses before long sessions that lean on Prism or rune scaling.
Let stat growth tell you when it is time to leave a flat upgrade lane and move into the next layer.

runes.title: Noob Incremental Runes Guide
runes.intro: Runes are one of the key scaling systems in Noob Incremental, built around rolling, leveling, speed bonuses, and luck bonuses.

cards.title: Roll Runes
cards.description: Roll runes as part of the main progression loop after building enough early Oof and upgrade strength.
cards.playerValue: Adds a deeper layer of scaling beyond basic Noob and upgrade growth.
cards.bestUse: Begin rune rolling once early upgrades are no longer the only meaningful source of progress.

cards.title: Level Runes
cards.description: Level runes after rolling them to improve their value across future progression.
cards.playerValue: Turns rune collection into an ongoing power system instead of a one-time roll check.
cards.bestUse: Keep leveling useful runes while preparing for prestige and later unlocks.

cards.title: Rune Speed Bonus
cards.description: Join the Ghoulax Games group and like the Roblox experience to activate the listed Rune Speed bonus.
cards.playerValue: Helps rune progression feel faster during repeated roll sessions.
cards.bestUse: Activate before long rune sessions so the bonus is already in place.

cards.title: Rune Luck Bonus
cards.description: Join the community server to activate the listed Rune Luck bonus from the official Roblox page.
cards.playerValue: Supports better rune rolling sessions by improving rune luck.
cards.bestUse: Activate before spending time on rune rolling or rune-focused progression.

cards.title: Rune Progression Timing
cards.description: Use runes after basic Noobs, Oof, and upgrades have created a stable run foundation.
cards.playerValue: Keeps early progress from spreading too thin across too many systems at once.
cards.bestUse: Shift more attention to runes when upgrade costs slow down or prestige preparation begins.

cards.title: Community Rune Setup
cards.description: Check the game group, game like status, and community server before focusing on rune systems.
cards.playerValue: Combines both public rune bonuses: +10% Rune Speed and +10% Rune Luck.
cards.bestUse: Complete this setup once, then use it as the default starting point for future rune sessions.

bonuses: Roll and level runes after the Noob and Oof route is already stable.
Use the group, like, and community server bonuses before long rune sessions.
Treat runes as a scaling layer that extends strong runs and supports prestige preparation.

prestige.title: Noob Incremental Prestige Guide
prestige.intro: Prestige is the reset-and-unlock layer that pushes Noob Incremental beyond basic Oof, upgrades, stats, and runes.

steps.title: Build the Base Run
steps.text: This creates the first layer of production needed to afford upgrades and prepare for later systems.
steps.checkpoint: Keep building while Oof gain and upgrade purchases still feel fast.

steps.title: Buy Strength Upgrades
steps.action: Spend progression resources on upgrades that make the run stronger.
steps.text: Upgrades are the main bridge between basic Noob production and deeper scaling.
steps.checkpoint: Continue upgrading until the next useful upgrades take noticeably longer to reach.

steps.title: Add Rune Progression
steps.action: Roll runes and level them up before pushing deeper into the run.
steps.text: Runes add another scaling layer and help support longer progression beyond basic upgrades.
steps.checkpoint: Use rune systems once early Oof and upgrade growth are stable.

steps.title: Activate Rune Bonuses
steps.action: Join the group and like the game for +10% Rune Speed, then join the community server for +10% Rune Luck.
steps.text: These bonuses improve rune sessions before prestige-focused pushing.
steps.checkpoint: Check these bonuses before investing heavily into rune rolling.

steps.title: Check the Prestige Option
steps.action: Open the in-game prestige layer when it becomes available.
steps.text: Prestige is used to unlock new content and move into deeper progression layers.
steps.checkpoint: Reset when the next prestige unlock gives better long-term value than staying in the current run.

steps.title: Prestige and Rebuild
steps.action: Use prestige, then rebuild through Noobs, Oof generation, upgrades, and runes again.
steps.text: The reset creates a stronger long-term route through newly unlocked content.
steps.checkpoint: After prestiging, return to early production first instead of spreading attention across every system immediately.

steps.title: Repeat Through New Layers
steps.action: Use each stronger run to reach the next prestige layer and new content unlocks.
steps.text: The game is designed around multiple prestige layers, so repeated resets are part of normal progression.
steps.checkpoint: Use each run to improve the next reset timing instead of treating prestige as a one-time milestone.

updates.title: Noob Incremental Discord and Updates
updates.intro: Use the official Roblox page, Ghoulax Games group, community Discord, and GhoulaxDev update post to track Noob Incremental news and rewards.
updates.panelText: These public sources cover the game page, community rewards, and the main update-tracking destinations players are most likely to use between play sessions.

links.title: Noob Incremental Roblox Page
links.description: Main place to play Noob Incremental and check the official game description, gameplay loop, public bonuses, and listed credits.
links.rewardNote: Lists Roblox Plus +10% Oof and +10% Prism, group-like +10% Rune Speed, and community server +10% Rune Luck.
links.bestFor: Playing the game and confirming the current official description.

links.title: Ghoulax Games Roblox Group
links.description: Official Roblox group connected to the Noob Incremental creator page and group-related game bonus flow.
links.rewardNote: The Roblox game page lists +10% Rune Speed for joining the group and liking the game.
links.bestFor: Group-linked reward setup and creator-side Roblox updates.

links.title: Ghoulax Studio Discord
links.description: Community server linked from the game's public sources for player discussion, announcements, and community information.
links.rewardNote: The Roblox game page lists +10% Rune Luck for joining the community server.
links.bestFor: Rune luck setup, news tracking, code discussion, and community questions.

links.title: GhoulaxDev Launch Post
links.description: Developer launch post pointing players to the newly released Noob Incremental experience.
links.rewardNote: Useful for confirming the launch announcement source and following future developer posts.

links.title: Destructoid Noob Incremental Codes
links.description: Public Roblox codes guide that covers active codes, code rewards, and the in-game Shop redemption path.
links.rewardNote: Mentions Tickets, Tokens, Potions, and the Shop-based code redemption flow.
links.bestFor: Checking code rewards and redeem steps alongside official sources.

bonuses: Roblox Plus adds +10% Oof and +10% Prism.
Join the Roblox group and like the game for +10% Rune Speed.
Join the community Discord for +10% Rune Luck.
Keep the launch post and the public code guide handy when checking new reward waves.

faq.title: Noob Incremental
faq.subtitle: Quick answers for the questions players ask most often before a fresh Noob Incremental session.

questions.question: How do Noob Incremental codes help early progress?
questions.answer: Noob Incremental codes add Tickets, Tokens, Potions, and milestone rewards that speed up the first upgrade route and make the opening economy less cramped.

questions.question: When should Noob Incremental players start rolling runes?
questions.answer: Noob Incremental runes are strongest after your Noob and Oof loop is already stable enough to support repeated rolls without slowing everything else down.

questions.question: When is the right time to prestige in Noob Incremental?
questions.answer: Prestige in Noob Incremental when another round of Noob buying and upgrades is barely changing your pace and the next meaningful unlock is still gated.

questions.question: What is the fastest Noob Incremental beginner route?
questions.answer: The best Noob Incremental opener is to redeem codes, raise Noobs, build Oof income, buy upgrades in bursts, then layer in runes and prestige only after the first wall appears.

questions.question: Where can I track Noob Incremental updates and bonuses?
questions.answer: Track Noob Incremental through the official Roblox game page, the Ghoulax Games Roblox group, the Ghoulax Studio Discord, and the GhoulaxDev X account.

cta.title: Ready to Push Deeper in Noob Incremental?
cta.description: Join the Ghoulax Studio community for code drops, update alerts, and Noob Incremental progression discussions.
